hook: The strongest photo set reduces avoidable doubt before your words even start working.
body: Clear, recent, human photos help people imagine what meeting you would actually feel like.

hook: Many men optimize for looking impressive while accidentally becoming harder to trust.
body: Use photos to create confidence through clarity rather than mystery through style.

hook: Use photos to create confidence through clarity rather than mystery through style.
body: A smiling well-lit portrait often does more useful work than a brooding shot that hides half your face.

body: Remove any photo that makes a stranger guess what you really look like in person.
